description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named MinGW build that runs on push to master, ghact branches and tags matching v*.*.*, and on pull requests to master, while ignoring changes to README.md and CONTRIBUTING.md. Use a single windows-latest job that checks out the repository, sets up MinGW for x64, caches libraries, installs libraries using a batch script, configures CMake for a 64-bit Debug build with MinGW Makefiles, and then builds the project using CMake.
